chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-1097 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.9259/2024 2. For orders on office objection as at “A” 3. For orders on M.A. No.8307/2024 4. For orders on M.A. No.8308/2024 5. For hearing of main case ------------------------------------------ 20.05.2025 Mr. Ishfaq Ahmed Khan, advocate for petitioner ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant constitution petition, it is accordingly dismissed along with pending applications. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
